words.def: pursue for food or sport (as of wild animals)
words.zh: a. 被捕獵的；受迫害的

words.def: the cardinal number that is the sum of nine and one; the base of the decimal system
that which is deserved or owed
words.zh: n. 應得的東西, 應付款

words.def: either extremity of something that has length
words.zh: n. 結束, 終點, 目標, 末端, 梢, 死亡, 殘餘

words.def: a computer network consisting of a worldwide network of computer networks that use the TCP/IP network protocols to facilitate data transmission and exchange
words.zh: n. 網, 網狀物, 羅網, 淨利, 淨價
